intro: Following Wirecutter’s hub idea, we group picks by how you brew—drip, budget drip, espresso (with a built-in grinder), French press, and Nespresso—then verify each one in Canada with CAD pricing.

Our reviewer stack matches your brief: Wirecutter, Consumer Reports, America’s Test Kitchen, CNN Underscored, Tom’s Guide, and James Hoffmann. What’s different here is the Canadian layer: retailers like Eight Ounce Coffee and brand Canadian storefronts, not just US links.
Pour-over drippers, cold-brew makers, standalone grinders, and electric kettles aren’t in this v1 hub yet—we can add those as separate pipeline sections when you’re ready.
